name: CobraWeb Browser
about:
About CobraWeb

CobraWeb is a lightweight, secure, and high performance web browser designed for users who prioritize privacy and speed. Built with a minimalist approach, it provides a seamless browsing experience without unnecessary clutter.

Key Features

Advanced Encryption: Your privacy is our priority. CobraWeb uses AES-256 Encryption to secure your search history and browsing data, ensuring that your information remains private and inaccessible to unauthorized eyes.

Smart Tab Management: Experience true multitasking with a professional tab system. You can switch between multiple websites easily with real time visual snapshots of your active pages.

Dynamic UI Interface: CobraWeb includes a toggleable toolbar that allows users to switch between top and bottom navigation layouts instantly to match their browsing comfort.

Integrated Download Manager: The browser includes a powerful built in download system that allows you to track download progress in real time with a clean and non intrusive popup interface.

Encrypted History and Search: Every search term and visited website URL is stored in a highly secure encrypted format inside the internal system so you remain in full control of your browsing history.

User Profiles: Personalize your browsing experience with a dedicated profile section where users can add their profile information and manage their settings securely.

Developer Credits

Developed by NS Development, CobraWeb is focused on delivering a fast, secure and modern browsing experience for everyone.
